steps.title: Identify the pattern to demonstrate
steps.content: The sentence states “For some species, more fish were collected in the winter than the other two seasons” and asks for an example. The key signal is: find a choice that shows a specific species with winter count exceeding both spring and fall, using the graph data.

steps.title: Check which choice demonstrates the pattern with data
steps.content: Choice A directly names common silver-biddy (winter: 35, spring: 17, fall: 10) and milkfish (winter: 12, spring: 7, fall: 0)—both clearly show winter exceeding other seasons. Choices B and C compare species within seasons rather than across seasons, and C also misnames the species; choice D focuses on fall. That matches choice A — A is correct.
